name: whistle.api-cache
description: Whistle plugin for API response recording and replay.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 dist/test/*.test.js dist/test/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:body-regression: npm run build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 -t body dist/test/shared/requestBody.test.js dist/test/server.test.js dist/test/rulesServer.test.js dist/test/resStatsServer.test.js
